title: Butter Chicken
description: Tender chicken in a creamy, buttery tomato sauce. A crowd-pleaser and restaurant favourite.

steps.summary: Marinate chicken in yogurt and spices.
subSteps: Mix yogurt with turmeric, red chilli powder, 1/2 tsp salt, and ginger-garlic paste.
Add chicken chunks and mix well.
Let marinate for 30 minutes (or longer for better flavor).
Cook marinated chicken in a skillet until cooked through but not fully tender.
Set aside.
Melt butter in a large pan over medium heat.
Add cumin seeds and let them sizzle.
Add chopped onions and cook until golden.
Add minced ginger and garlic, cook for 1 minute.
Add tomato puree and cook for 5 minutes, stirring frequently.
The tomatoes should darken and oil should separate from sauce.
Add garam masala, red chilli powder, and salt.
Cook for 2 minutes for spices to bloom.
Pour in heavy cream and stir well.
Simmer for 3-4 minutes on low heat.
steps.tip: The sauce should be smooth and rich. If too thick, add a splash of water.

steps.summary: Add cooked chicken to the sauce and simmer.
subSteps: Add cooked chicken pieces to the sauce.
Stir gently to coat all pieces with sauce.
Simmer for 2-3 minutes on low heat.
Taste and adjust salt and spices.
Add a pinch of sugar if sauce is too acidic (optional).
Garnish with fresh cilantro and green chillies.
Serve hot with naan, rice, or paratha.

seo.metaTitle: Butter Chicken Recipe — Creamy Restaurant Style
seo.metaDescription: Make authentic butter chicken at home with this easy step-by-step recipe. Perfect with naan and rice.
